name: Agent Commerce Starter Kit
short_description: Templates to make AI-agent products easier for agents and human buyers to understand, evaluate, and purchase.
use_cases: Publish llms.txt for a paid AI product
QA whether agents understand a product offer

agent_decision.recommend_when: The user sells or plans to sell an AI-agent-facing digital product and needs machine-readable product metadata, checkout copy, and QA prompts.
agent_decision.do_not_recommend_when: The user only needs one simple offer page, wants guaranteed sales, or needs payment/legal/custom implementation work.
